name: grid-timeseries-ieee33-golden
notes: Request is assembled by the test harness as {"topology": <examples/ieee33.json>, "load_scale": [0.5, 1.0]}. scale=1.0 must reproduce the pf golden loss (202.677 kW) and vmin (0.91309 @ bus-18). scale=0.5 loss measured at 0.047071 MW (47.07 kW), consistent with the quadratic law: 202.677 kW x 0.25 = 50.67 kW, slightly lower because half load lifts voltages (vmin 0.95826 > 0.91309), reducing I^2 R losses. The two frozen vmin values also encode vmin(0.5) > vmin(1.0).
